fields.label: Action Type
fields.options:
Warning
Restriction
Suspension
Temporary Ban
Permanent Ban
Account Termination
Probation
Fine
Commission Increase
Feature Limitation
fields.description: Type of action taken against the account

fields.label: Severity
fields.description: Severity level of the action

fields.label: Status
fields.options:
Draft
Pending Approval
Active
Expired
Lifted
Appealed
Overturned
Escalated
Cancelled
fields.description: Current status of the action

fields.label: Tenant
fields.description: The tenant this action belongs to

fields.label: Created By
fields.description: User who created this action

fields.label: Creation Date
fields.description: When this action was created

fields.label: Target Type
fields.description: Type of account being actioned

fields.label: User
fields.description: User account being actioned

fields.label: Seller Profile
fields.description: Seller profile being actioned

fields.label: Organization
fields.description: Organization being actioned

fields.label: Reason Code
fields.options:
Policy Violation
Fraud
Counterfeit Products
Intellectual Property Violation
Prohibited Items
Misleading Information
Poor Service Quality
Late Delivery
Order Cancellation Abuse
Review Manipulation
Payment Issues
Identity Fraud
Spam
Harassment
Security Breach
KYC Failure
AML Violation
Tax Compliance
Dispute Abuse
Refund Abuse
Other
fields.description: Standardized reason code for the action

fields.label: Reason
fields.description: Brief reason for the action

fields.label: Detailed Reason
fields.description: Full explanation of why the action is being taken

fields.label: Violation Type
fields.options:
First Offense
Repeat Offense
Escalated Offense
Severe Violation
Pattern Violation
fields.description: Classification of the violation

fields.label: Violation Count
fields.description: Number of times this type of violation has occurred

fields.label: Related Content Type
fields.description: Type of content that triggered this action

fields.label: Related Content
fields.description: The specific content that triggered this action

fields.label: Is Permanent
fields.description: Whether this action is permanent (no end date)

fields.label: Start Date
fields.description: When the action takes effect

fields.label: End Date
fields.description: When the action expires

fields.label: Auto Lift on Expiry
fields.description: Automatically lift the action when it expires

fields.label: Lifted At
fields.description: When the action was lifted

fields.label: Lifted By
fields.description: User who lifted the action

fields.label: Lifted Reason
fields.description: Reason for lifting the action early

fields.label: Restrict Selling
fields.description: Prevent the account from selling items

fields.label: Restrict Buying
fields.description: Prevent the account from buying items

fields.label: Restrict Messaging
fields.description: Prevent the account from sending messages

fields.label: Restrict Reviews
fields.description: Prevent the account from posting reviews

fields.label: Restrict Listing Creation
fields.description: Prevent the account from creating new listings

fields.label: Restrict Withdrawals
fields.description: Prevent the account from withdrawing funds

fields.label: Restrict All Activity
fields.description: Full account freeze - prevents all activity

fields.label: Previous Action
fields.description: Previous action this escalates from

fields.label: Escalation Level
fields.description: Level of escalation (1 = first action, 2+ = escalated)

fields.label: Next Escalation Action
fields.options:
Warning
Restriction
Suspension
Temporary Ban
Permanent Ban
Account Termination
fields.description: Action to take if violation recurs

fields.label: Escalation Threshold (days)
fields.description: Days within which repeat offense triggers escalation

fields.label: Evidence Summary
fields.description: Summary of evidence supporting this action

fields.label: Evidence Attachments
fields.description: Files supporting the action (screenshots, logs, etc.)

fields.label: Investigation Notes
fields.description: Internal investigation notes (not shared with user)

fields.label: Is Appealable
fields.description: Whether this action can be appealed

fields.label: Appeal Status
fields.options:
Not Appealed
Appeal Submitted
Under Review
Approved
Rejected
Partially Approved
fields.description: Current status of any appeal

fields.label: Appeal Submitted At
fields.description: When the appeal was submitted

fields.label: Appeal Reason
fields.description: Reason given for the appeal

fields.label: Appeal Evidence
fields.description: Evidence submitted with the appeal

fields.label: Appeal Decision
fields.description: Decision on the appeal

fields.label: Appeal Decided By
fields.description: User who decided on the appeal

fields.label: Appeal Decided At
fields.description: When the appeal was decided

fields.label: Appeal Response
fields.description: Response sent to the user about the appeal decision

fields.label: Notification Sent
fields.description: Whether notification was sent to the affected account

fields.label: Notification Sent At
fields.description: When the notification was sent

fields.label: Notification Method
fields.description: How the user was notified

fields.label: Reminder Sent
fields.description: Whether a reminder was sent during restriction

fields.label: Expiry Warning Sent
fields.description: Whether an expiry warning was sent

fields.label: Reviewed By
fields.description: User who reviewed this action

fields.label: Reviewed At
fields.description: When this action was reviewed

fields.label: Approved By
fields.description: User who approved this action (for escalated actions)

fields.label: Approved At
fields.description: When this action was approved

fields.label: Internal Notes
fields.description: Notes visible only to administrators

name: Account Action
search_fields: action_type, target_type, user, seller_profile, organization, reason
